summary: Tested FlowModal implementation for Fresh Meals page (/dine/meals). All 13 features verified. Fixed critical bug: buildTicketPayload was missing required 'customer' and 'details' fields for /api/service-requests endpoint. After fix, complete flow works: modal opens → 5 steps completed → ticket created (TKT-B0812B90) → navigates to /inbox.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: buildTicketPayload() was missing required 'customer' and 'details' fields for /api/service-requests endpoint
Fixed: FlowModal now passes user object to buildTicketPayload for customer info
seed_data_creation: Created ticket TKT-B0812B90 via FlowModal submission
context_for_next_testing_agent: FlowModal for Fresh Meals is fully functional. All 3 schemas (Trial Pack, Weekly Plan, Allergy-Safe) have 5 steps each. Constraint enforcement (blocked proteins) works in both page and modal. Draft persistence uses localStorage with key format: draft:${userId}:${petId}:fresh-meals.

features_verified.3. Hero image allergy-aware: PASS - Shows fish/salmon image, not chicken
features_verified.4. Mira can set a plan section: PASS - Shows 'Mira can set a plan for Mystique' with Build Fresh Plan CTA
features_verified.5. Chicken protein blocked in Plan Build: PASS - Chicken chip is disabled/greyed with line-through and X icon
features_verified.6. Allergy-safe toggle Auto-on: PASS - Toggle is on with 'Auto-on' badge
features_verified.8. Allergy-Safe card with Recommended ba: PASS - Shows 'Recommended' badge since pet has allergies
features_verified.12. Chicken blocked in FlowModal Step 3: PASS - Chicken button disabled with 'Some options blocked based on Mystique's restrictions' message
features_verified.13. Complete flow and submit creates tic: PASS - Ticket TKT-B0812B90 created, navigates to /inbox

bug_fixed.root_cause: The payload builder function didn't include customer and details fields required by ServiceRequestPayload model in backend
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Updated buildTicketPayload to include customer object (name, email, phone) and details object (all flow data)
